title: Office space to be furnished
doc_html:
§207.  Office space to be furnished

The president of the Louisiana State University and the director of the school of geology shall furnish the State Department of Conservation with adequate office space to carry out the survey under R.S. 30:206.
doc_text:
§207.  Office space to be furnished
The president of the Louisiana State University and the director of the school of geology shall furnish the State Department of Conservation with adequate office space to carry out the survey under R.S. 30:206.
